statuses.pass: The preregistered gate passed on the declared evidence.
statuses.fail: The preregistered gate failed on the declared evidence.
statuses.inconclusive: Evidence exists but cannot adjudicate the gate.
statuses.not_run: The registered run has not produced evidence yet.
statuses.superseded: A newer evidence record replaces this record; history remains immutable.
statuses.retired: The claim or run was intentionally retired before adjudication.

records.notes: The corrected positive-price Lagrangian and d=1 allocation pass executable regression checks.
Expected error reduction is now MAE_now - MAE_after; the heuristic is explicitly scoped.
The frozen design fails generator, group-specificity, and transport gates; the apparent win is coverage-localized.
Only 8 of 104 candidates meet the two-surface threshold versus 52 required; confirmatory execution is blocked.
The external-contact result does not support portable weakness-to-generalization causality.
Load-bearing and perturbation-resistance proxies are present, but basin geometry and return dynamics were not measured.

All seven assumption families have deterministic satisfying examples and paired assumption/predicate failures. The audit does not test theorem necessity, downstream conclusion invalidation, or minimality.
Exact enumeration preserves the counterexample: the highest-information misspecified probe has zero oracle EVSI and negative true expected regret reduction, while a weaker robust signal is useful.
Three seeds were insufficient in every registered regime; promotion required 16 seeds in independent regimes, 64 in hierarchical regimes, and remained unavailable for the weak high-noise regime.

A transparent synthetic SCM gives the policy-causal and decodable-only features identical perfect decoding accuracy while only the policy parent produces a positive mass-normalized dose response across two commitment surfaces; separate fixtures verify scale normalization.

Only causal specificity favored a segmented fit; critical-point stability and multi-order-parameter co-location failed, so bifurcation is not supported. No separate positive smooth-crossover criterion was preregistered.

A seed-cluster bootstrap preserving both architectures yielded loop area 0.04471 across six contiguous significant continuation couplings and four under washout; the effect survived washout and cleared reinitialization controls.
